title: 1. SUJ  In case of lung involvement:
text:
a) Coloring the correspondence area of the lung with green and cover and stick the
green mung bean seed on that part for at least 8 hours daily in one hand (Thenar
area)
b) Massage the area of lung correspondence, deep and rotating and upwards (with
the tip of thumb) in the other hand, 3 times a day for at least 5 minutes each time.
The next day, repeat the same operation in the opposite way in the palms
15 | P a g e
